documentation.description:
Contains the routine for computing the image in based format of signed and
unsigned integers larger than Integer for use by Text_IO.Integer_IO and
Text_IO.Modular_IO.

subprograms.name: Set_Image_Based_Long_Long_Integer
Set_Image_Based_Long_Long_Unsigned

generic_instantiations.name: Impl
generic_instantiations.code: package Impl is new Image_B (Long_Long_Integer, Long_Long_Unsigned);
